description: BigQuery Connection API is a Google Cloud service for managing BigQuery connections to external data sources and related resources. It is part of the BigQuery platform and is exposed as a Google API on `bigqueryconnection.googleapis.com`.
summary: 1 HTTP API: BigQuery Connection API at `https://bigqueryconnection.googleapis.com`, authenticated with Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens / ADC; no GraphQL, MCP, or standalone CLI surface found for this domain.
